title: Japanese Beef Bowl
description: A savory and flavorful Japanese-style beef bowl recipe that is easy to make. Perfect for a quick and delicious meal.

ingredients.name: Beef
ingredients.notes: sirloin or ribeye, sliced into thin strips

instructions: 1. In a small bowl, whisk together malty sauce, soy sauce, and grated ginger.
2. In a large skillet or wok, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add the sliced beef and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until browned and cooked through.
4. Add the sauce mixture to the skillet and stir to combine.
5. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
6. Serve the beef and sauce over a bowl of steamed rice.
7. Garnish with additional sliced green onions and sesame seeds if desired.
